anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

statement: Microcosm Belief-State Process Reward Replay Author
title: Microcosm Belief-State Process Reward Replay Author
triggers: The belief-state process reward replay standard declares this author skill and needs a governed instance rather than planned route pressure.

The instance can be authored from public synthetic belief-state fixtures, reward policy evidence, source-module manifests, negative cases, and receipts without claiming live training or benchmark authority.
workflow: Read the standard JSON, organ registry row, fixture protocol, exported runtime bundle, source-module manifest, mechanism source, receipts, and generated lattice health.

Author only source-backed public fields: episode refs, belief-state refs, verifier feedback refs, process and outcome reward refs, trajectory refs, cold replay refs, source-module refs, receipt expectations, authority boundary, and anti-claims.

Regenerate the skill corpus and lattice projection, then keep hidden reasoning, live RL training, benchmark scoring, provider execution, source mutation, and release readiness outside the claim ceiling.
